channel.title: resume on Jas D Powell
channel.description: Recent content in resume on Jas D Powell

item.title: 💼 Resume in JSON Format 👩‍💼 📋 📎
item.description: This is worth sharing: Thomas Davies (jsonresume.org) has made a online resume host and formatter, so long as your resume is in JSON format. Let’s check it out…

item.title: 📝 Resume 👩‍💻 🥙 🇨🇾
item.description: Dr. Jas D Powell Enabling tech start-ups to scale their seed ideas to mass market products. Serious about building technology teams that innovate and win. Experience Andle Engineering, Ltd - Director & Chief Consultant Larnaca, Cyprus, May 2016 - Present Boutique technology consultancy. Short contracts (3-6 months) have included remote roles with cybersecurity start-up teams in San Francisco, USA and Milano, Italy. Skills included: Team Leadership, Project Management, Cryptography & Networking Protocol Design, Raspberry Pi OS customization (yocto, Debian), OS Hardening, Python, C/C++, Ansible, Linux, AWS, C/C++, Network Architecture Design, API Design
